title: AI-driven Casimir Stiction-Suppressing Chiral Tellurium Metamaterials
description: Full-stack physics research pipeline for Casimir stiction suppression using chiral Tellurium metamaterials. Implements Lifshitz theory with uniaxial Fresnel coefficients, two-oscillator Sellmeier dielectric model, finite-temperature Matsubara summation, and three-objective NSGA-II optimization. Includes the casimir-tools PyPI package, FastAPI backend, and React 3D dashboard. Target: IEEE Transactions on Nanotechnology + SERB CRG funding.
